content.text:
All 5 tests pass. The vertical blinker test passes without any new code because the existing implementation already correctly handles the general Game of Life rules (B3/S23) using neighbor counting over candidate cells.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: No changes needed — existing `nextGeneration` already handles the blinker case via general B3/S23 rules
- Result: All 5 tests pass (3 todo remain)
- Approach: Minimal — the previous Green phases generalized the implementation enough that the blinker (which requires B3 reproduction at [-1,1] and [1,1], plus S2 survival of [0,1], plus death of [0,0] and [0,2] from underpopulation) already works correctly
